where.if: AND (e.exmy1_id ILIKE '%'||#{searchValue}||'%' OR e.col11 ILIKE '%'||#{searchValue}||'%' OR e.col12 ILIKE '%'||#{searchValue}||'%' OR e.col13 ILIKE '%'||#{searchValue}||'%' OR e.col14 ILIKE '%'||#{searchValue}||'%' OR e.col15 ILIKE '%'||#{searchValue}||'%')

mapper.select: SELECT /* base.zz :: ZzExmy1 :: selectById */ e.exmy1_id, e.col11, e.col12, e.col13, e.col14, e.col15, e.reg_by, e.reg_date, e.upd_by, e.upd_date FROM shopjoy_2604.zz_exmy1 e WHERE e.exmy1_id = #{exmy1Id}

SELECT /* base.zz :: ZzExmy1 :: selectList */ e.exmy1_id, e.col11, e.col12, e.col13, e.col14, e.col15, e.reg_by, e.reg_date, e.upd_by, e.upd_date FROM shopjoy_2604.zz_exmy1 e
ORDER BY e.exmy1_id ASC

SELECT /* base.zz :: ZzExmy1 :: selectPageList */ e.exmy1_id, e.col11, e.col12, e.col13, e.col14, e.col15, e.reg_by, e.reg_date, e.upd_by, e.upd_date FROM shopjoy_2604.zz_exmy1 e
ORDER BY e.exmy1_id ASC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(e.*) /* base.zz :: ZzExmy1 :: selectPageCount */ FROM shopjoy_2604.zz_exmy1 e
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO shopjoy_2604.zz_exmy1 /* base.zz :: ZzExmy1 :: insert */ (exmy1_id, col11, col12, col13, col14, col15, reg_by, reg_date, upd_by, upd_date) VALUES (#{exmy1Id}, #{col11}, #{col12}, #{col13}, #{col14}, #{col15}, #{regBy}, #{regDate}, #{updBy}, #{updDate})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM shopjoy_2604.zz_exmy1 /* base.zz :: ZzExmy1 :: delete */ WHERE exmy1_id = #{exmy1Id}
